w2:gBody.w2:row:
<w2:column displayMode="label" id="odrNo" inputType="text" width="100" readOnly="true" class="underline" style="color:<%=dcss.optional_color%>;">
<w2:column displayMode="label" id="sellItemNm" inputType="text" width="100" textAlign="left" readOnly="true" style="color:<%=dcss.optional_color%>;">

영세 02
기타 03

Yes 1
